description_long: This is a two-door, upright refrigerator with a bold red exterior and a simple, boxy design. The front features two vertically aligned doors, each with a long, metallic handle on the left side, and two small square magnets or notes attached to the upper and lower doors. The sides are smooth and unadorned, while the back panel is slightly recessed and includes a rectangular vent near the bottom, with a visible power cord extending from it. The refrigerator stands on a flat, black base, suggesting stability and a modern aesthetic. The overall appearance is clean and minimalistic, with no visible brand logo or digital controls.
description: A red, two-door upright refrigerator with metallic handles and a rear vent, featuring a clean, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two doors with metallic handles, and two small square magnets or notes on the upper and lower doors.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a smooth, uninterrupted red surface and the profile of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a rectangular vent near the bottom and a power cord extending from the back.
description_view_3: Right side view with a smooth red surface and the power cord partially visible trailing from the back.
attribute_door_handle_style: Long, vertical, metallic handles protruding from the left edge of each door.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Rectangular vent with horizontal slats located near the bottom of the back panel.
